name: lib-capacitor-nfc-pass-wallet-workspace
description: Workspace root for NFC pass wallet plugins

scripts.lint:android: if [ "$USE_SYSTEM_ANDROID_SDK" = "1" ]; then cd packages/capacitor/android && gradle lint; elif command -v devenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then devenv shell -- sh -c 'cd packages/capacitor/android && gradle lint'; else cd packages/capacitor/android && gradle lint; fi
scripts.lint:ios: cd packages/capacitor && pod lib lint CapacitorNFCPassWallet.podspec --allow-warnings
scripts.lint:flutter: cd packages/flutter && (command -v flutter >/dev/null 2>&1 && flutter analyze || echo 'flutter not found, skipping local flutter lint')
scripts.build:android: if [ "$USE_SYSTEM_ANDROID_SDK" = "1" ]; then cd packages/capacitor/android && gradle assemble; elif command -v devenv >/dev/null 2>&1; then devenv shell -- sh -c 'cd packages/capacitor/android && gradle assemble'; else cd packages/capacitor/android && gradle assemble; fi
scripts.build:ios: cd packages/capacitor && pod lib lint CapacitorNFCPassWallet.podspec --allow-warnings
scripts.build:flutter: cd packages/flutter && flutter pub get && flutter analyze
